---
title: "Sandpit"
format: html
---

### Exercise

Change the correct answer from **B** to **A**, then test the quiz.


#### Task:

Click run to display the results of the html and javascript. Test it. Edit the correct answer in the html, run it, and test it again.</p>

::: {style="display: flex; gap: 20px;"}
```{=html}
<textarea id="editor" style="width: 50%; height: 320px;">
<form id="quiz">

<p><strong>1) Ask a question here</strong><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="A"> A) Option 1</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) Option 2</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="C"> C) Option 3</label></p>

<p><button type="submit">✔️ Submit</button></p>

</form>

<div id="result" style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 1em;"></div>

<script>
document.getElementById("quiz").addEventListener("submit", function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  const correct = document.querySelectorAll('input[data-correct="true"]:checked').length;
  const total = 1;

  const result = document.getElementById("result");

  let message = `You scored ${correct}/${total}. `;

  if (correct === total) {
    message += "Excellent!";
  } else {
    message += "Try again.";
  }

  result.textContent = message;
});
</script>
  </textarea>
```

<iframe id="preview" style="width: 50%; height: 320px; border: 1px solid #ccc;"></iframe>
:::

<p>

<button onclick="runCode()">
 Run 
</button>

</p>

```{=html}
<script>
function runCode() {
  const code = document.getElementById("editor").value;
  document.getElementById("preview").srcdoc = code;
}
</script>
```

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Publishing.html)
